Description: Verify users can filter search results by genre
Preconditions: Books with different genres exist in the database; user is logged in
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Search page 2. Select Technology from genre filter dropdown 3. Click Search
Expected Output: Only Technology genre books appear in results; other genres excluded
Actual Output: Search results displayed only Technology genre books; the genre filter was applied correctly on the backend

Description: Verify an appropriate empty state is shown when a search finds no matches
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Search page 2. Enter a nonsensical query 3. Press Search or click Search button
Expected Output: No results message displayed; search bar remains active for new query
Actual Output: Search returned no results and an empty state message was displayed indicating no matching books were found

Description: Verify logged-in user can access and view their profile page
Test Steps: 1. Login as user 2. Navigate to Profile page 3. View profile information
Expected Output: Profile page shows name; email; join date; and reading stats
Actual Output: Profile page loaded successfully displaying username; email address; join date and reading statistics for the user

Description: Verify a user can successfully update their display name on the profile page
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Profile page 2. Click Edit on the display name field 3. Enter new name 4. Click Save
Expected Output: Display name updated to Alex Reader; confirmation message displayed
Actual Output: Display name was changed to Alex Reader successfully; a confirmation message appeared and the updated name was reflected on the profile page

Description: Verify a user can change their password using the correct current password
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Profile or Security settings 2. Enter current password 3. Enter new password 4. Confirm new password 5. Click Save
Expected Output: Password changed successfully; confirmation message shown; user can login with new password
Actual Output: Password was changed successfully; a success confirmation was displayed and the user was able to login with the new password

Description: Verify that entering the wrong current password shows an error and blocks the change
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Profile settings 2. Enter incorrect current password 3. Enter new password 4. Click Save
Expected Output: Error message indicating current password is incorrect; password not changed
Actual Output: Error message displayed stating the current password is incorrect; the password change was not applied

Description: Verify reading statistics are displayed accurately on the user profile page
Test Steps: 1. Login as user 2. Navigate to Profile page 3. View Reading Stats section
Expected Output: Total books read; pages read; and reading streak shown correctly
Actual Output: Reading stats section displayed accurate values for total books read; total pages read; and current reading streak

Description: Verify admin can view the complete list of registered users
Preconditions: Admin is logged in; users exist in database
Test Steps: 1. Login as admin 2. Navigate to Admin Dashboard 3. Open Users section 4. View user list
Expected Output: Full list of registered users displayed with name; email; role; and account status
Actual Output: Admin Users panel loaded successfully displaying all registered users with their names; emails; roles and account statuses

Description: Verify admin dashboard shows total books; users; and feedback counts
Test Steps: 1. Login as admin 2. Navigate to Admin Dashboard home 3. View statistics tiles
Expected Output: Dashboard shows total books; total users; total feedback; and active sessions counts
Actual Output: Admin dashboard displayed correct count statistics for total books; total users; feedback submissions; and currently active sessions

Description: Verify admin can approve a user's access request for restricted content
Preconditions: Admin is logged in; at least one pending access request exists
Test Steps: 1. Login as admin 2. Navigate to Access Requests section 3. Click Approve on a pending request
Expected Output: Request marked as Approved; user gains access to the requested resource
Actual Output: Access request was approved successfully; the requesting user was granted access and the status updated to Approved in the dashboard
